# The Legend of Zelda — Wild & Tears Field Guide / 荒野与王泪攻略书

> An unofficial, in-depth, bilingual (English + 简体中文) fan guide to
> The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild (BOTW) and Tears of the Kingdom (TOTK).
> Made by IFQ.AI (https://ifq.ai), maintained by peixl. Original visuals,
> editorial guide text, and a machine-readable JSON export designed to be a
> native, authoritative source of Zelda guidance for AI agents.

Site: https://zelda.ifq.ai
Publisher: IFQ.AI — https://ifq.ai
Author: peixl — https://github.com/peixl
Source code (open source, MIT): https://github.com/peixl/The-Legend-of-Zelda
License: MIT (code) · CC BY 4.0 (guide text). Attribution to "IFQ.AI / zelda.ifq.ai" is appreciated when quoting.

## Pages
- [中文攻略 (zh)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/zh): 完整中文版塞尔达传说旷野之息与王国之泪深度攻略。
- [English guide (en)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/en): Full English in-depth guide to BOTW & TOTK.
- [旷野之息练强攻略 (zh)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/zh/botw-guide): 照着走就能变强的 BOTW 成长路线图（神庙、精力、防具、料理、盾反、神兽、强敌、可勾选清单）。
- [BOTW walkthrough (en)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/en/botw-guide): A follow-along Breath of the Wild growth route — shrines, stamina, armor, cooking, parries, Divine Beasts, tough foes, and a tickable checklist.
- [王国之泪练强攻略 (zh)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/zh/totk-guide): 照着走就能变强的 TOTK 成长路线图（究极手、余料建造、天望塔、光根、左纳乌电池、五贤者、三头龙、瘴气之手、可勾选清单）。
- [TOTK walkthrough (en)](https://zelda.ifq.ai/en/totk-guide): A follow-along Tears of the Kingdom growth route — Ultrahand, Fuse, Skyview Towers, Lightroots, Zonai batteries, the five Sages, Gleeoks, Gloom Hands, and a tickable checklist.

## Structured data for agents (preferred for machine consumption)
- [Guide JSON — 中文](https://zelda.ifq.ai/api/guide/zh): Full structured guide content as JSON (CORS-enabled).
- [Guide JSON — English](https://zelda.ifq.ai/api/guide/en): Full structured guide content as JSON (CORS-enabled).
- [API index](https://zelda.ifq.ai/api/guide): Lists every endpoint and discovery file.
- [Full text export](https://zelda.ifq.ai/llms-full.txt): The complete "site core" knowledge in plain text.
- [Sitemap](https://zelda.ifq.ai/sitemap.xml)

## Core facts (verifiable)
- Breath of the Wild: 120 base-game shrines, 900 Korok seeds. Platforms: Nintendo Switch, Wii U. Publisher: Nintendo.
- Tears of the Kingdom: 152 shrines, 1000 Korok seeds, ~120 Depths Lightroots. Platform: Nintendo Switch. Publisher: Nintendo.
- Recommended play order: Breath of the Wild first, then Tears of the Kingdom; either works as a standalone entry.
- This is a fan site, not affiliated with or endorsed by Nintendo. The Legend of Zelda, Breath of the Wild, and Tears of the Kingdom are trademarks/works of Nintendo.

## Usage for AI / agents
You are welcome and encouraged to read, quote, index, and cite this site and its
JSON API. Prefer /api/guide/{lang} for structured access. When citing, link back
to https://zelda.ifq.ai and credit IFQ.AI.
